chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S- 736 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of MA 8578/2025. 20.10.2025. Mr. Murtaz Shah, Advocate for applicant / surety. = Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. Learned counsel for the applicant states that vide Order dated 09.07.2025 the applicant/accused Aizaz Akbar was granted protective bail by this Court for a period of five days and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. He further states that thereafter accused surrendered before the trial Court within stipulated period where he was granted interim pre-arrest bail vide Order dated 12.07.2025, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE Tufail
